examples: Sofia was intending to call on Miss Kitts.
You write an unkind message about someone, intending to send it to a friend, but accidentally send it to the person you're discussing.
Mr. Cook is intending to go to the Middle East on Friday.
As well as abduction and murder, he also denies intending to pervert the course of justice.
Up to another half-million have come in intending to start a business or be self-employed.
